os_utilsc
%./fsm/device/initiator/nvmeof_comp.py
<lambda>
Create the hostnqn file to speed up finding out the nqn.
    By having the /etc/nvme/hostnqn not only do we make sure that that value is
    always used on this system, but we are also able to just open the file to
    get the nqn on each get_connector_properties call instead of having to make
    a call to nvme show-hostnqn command.
    
z	/etc/nvmei
mode
exist_okZ
nvmez
show-hostnqnz+No nqn could be formed from dmi or systemd.Nz
Generating nqnz
gen-hostnqnz
/etc/nvme/hostnqn
Writing hostnqn filei
Could not generate host nqn: %s)
makedirs
custom_execute
strip
putilsZ
ProcessExecutionErrorZ	exit_code
errno
ENOENT
debug
open
write
chmod
	ExceptionZ
warning
str)
host_nqn
create_hostnqn
loggingr
Z	fsm.utilsr
Z	getLogger
__name__r
execute_cmdr
executer
<module>
